# t1 - Migration Constitution

## Summary

Initial constitution adopted for the DayTrader8 brownfield rewrite from Java EE 8/Open Liberty to
Spring Boot 3. The constitution fixes the project mode as a rewrite, locks in parity preservation,
sets the Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta-only runtime boundary, and requires same-schema/same-auth
preservation with evidence-backed validation.

## Deliverables

- [constitution.md](./constitution.md) - governing migration constitution for all downstream roles

## Notes

- Version adopted: 1.0.0
- Template alignment reviewed for implementation-plan and feature-spec templates; no template edits
  were required.
- Breaking-down-tasks template review is pending because the referenced template is not present in
  the available skills path.
